case_title: CHAN, TZE CHEE et al vs. LEE, MING et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT LI, KAM MING SUED HEREIN AS LEE, MING HEARING SET FOR JUL-25-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT LI, KAM MING SUED HEREIN AS LEE, MING

DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ATNY A.EVJE PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT MING LEE, IN PRO-PER, PRESENT WITH CANTONESE INTERPRETER KEVIN KUANG. PLTF ORAL MOT TO ADD NAME OF SECOND DEFT YAN NGOR ZHOU (WIFE OF DEFT) IS GRANTED. DEFT STATES THAT BOTH DEFTS HAVE VACATED THE PREMISES AND HANDS A SET OF KEYS TO PLTF IN OPEN COURT. PLTF ATNY REQUESTS THAT TRIAL REMAIN ON 8-6-97 TRIAL CALENDAR UNTIL DEFTS' VACATING OF PREMISES CAN BE VERIFIED. IF DEFTS HAVE VACATED, PLTF WILL FILE DISMISSAL & TAKE CASE OFF TRIAL CALENDAR AS WELL AS WAIVE BACK RENT, DAMAGES, ATNYS FEES & COSTS.
